CustomField.formula: IF ( ISPICKVAL(BU__c, 'M') , '1' , IF (ISPICKVAL(BU__c, 'S'), '2', '3') ) & MajorClassificationCode__c & MinorClassificationCode__c & IF ( RecordType.DeveloperName ='Chassis', '0', '1') & RIGHT( CategoryCode__c , 1) & LPAD( TEXT( SpecialSpecificationNo__c ) , 2, '0') & LPAD( TEXT( RECNo__c ) , 5, '0')
CustomField.label: 明細レコード表示順(数式)
